title: Align repository documentation with chat-only patch workflow process
scope: Promote the chat-only patch workflow as a first-class development path across documentation
Update control-plane development workflow documentation to reference the patch pipeline
Document helper scripts and required sequence from workorder creation through patch application
Record all documentation changes in root and control-plane changelogs
acceptance_criteria: Core repository docs describe the chat-only patch workflow consistently
Control-plane dev workflow reflects patch-only and workorder-first process details
Both changelogs include entries for this work order
risk_notes: Documentation-only changes may drift if future process updates are not maintained consistently
rollback_plan: Revert documentation files changed in this work order
